ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently available for sale */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of units sold */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated by the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "final_total" TEXT /* Final total amount after discounts and tax */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or special instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "final_total" TEXT /* Final total amount for the item after discounts and tax */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item has been returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund if applicable */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card used (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last reordered */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Next date to reorder the product */,
  "is_low_stock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock is low */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipment is insured */,
  "insurance_cost" TEXT /* Cost of insurance if applicable */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status (e.g., shipped, delivered, in transit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., requested, approved, processed) */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., mail, in-store) */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  "return_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images attached to the review */,
  "video_links" TEXT /* Video links attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
